_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/<exp-id>.json, following the f2b-replicate / f2b-transfer-llmproxy precedent. Same candidate name 'verifier-offload' as the F2 line because this record's entire consumer set lives there - but this is an INSTRUMENT-GUARD record on that line, not a candidate result: it measures the JUDGE class, not the kernel. It is nonetheless a PRIMARY experiment, not a proxy: the estimand is a property of LLM judges themselves (the pool actually in force on the f2b line), so no future human pass supersedes it - the human question is a separately registered extrapolation (ASM-0047), not a re-verification of this record.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per docs/next/opus-execution-practices.md practice 4: the Opus runner produced only the mechanical verdict, the Codex Gate-A audit recomputed it from bytes, and what the outcome MEANS is decided here and only here. This record's single job is to fix what the truthstyle-2x2 PASS does and does not license for the CORRECTNESS thesis; the frozen extrapolation_envelope_verbatim and kill_criterion_verbatim are adopted BINDING and quoted where load-bearing. New interpretive stipulations minted by this assessment: ASM-0680 (consumption discipline, load-bearing), ASM-0681 (direction reading, non-load-bearing).

verdict_ref._verdict_note: Fully upgraded verdict: the file already carries verdict=PASS with audit.state=CONFIRMED filled in (the in-place post-audit upgrade is done, unlike the llmproxy assessment's timing). The audit record's verdict_object_audited_sha256 31391cb5633437eedca52d3e875e8f5b8d7c193a3c979d293bc4a897d40a112b names the pre-upgrade PASS-PENDING-AUDIT bytes it recomputed; the sha above is the current post-upgrade file. This assessment interprets the audited numbers, which are byte-identical between the two.

_surprise_note: No registered prior exists for the point effect, and under the frozen power plan (>=0.99 at true effect 0) a PASS was the anticipated branch, so no 'surprise-*' tag is licensed. The one mildly informative measured fact: the 90% interval [0.0033, 0.0467] EXCLUDES ZERO - the style effect is real, small, and NSM-favoring, not absent. Its direction is consistent with the ASM-0021/ASM-0552 tradition-familiarity plausibility argument (register component only; see ASM-0681), which carries no weight anywhere below.

interpretation.kill_chain_read: Neither kill fired and the equivalence rule did. Primary: style main effect at matched truth on the 600 evaluable tier-2 (judge, content-pair) units = +0.025 (15/600, independently re-derived by the auditor), concept-cluster bootstrap (B=10000, seed 20260710) 90% interval [0.0033, 0.0467], strictly inside the frozen +/-0.10 margin => style_tost_pass=true, style_leak_established=false, fired_rule_index 2 = PASS [MEASURED]. This is a decisive TOST pass, not an underpowered straddle: leaks beyond 0.0467 are excluded at the one-sided 95% level, so the pre-declared conservative consumer rule's INCONCLUSIVE branch is nowhere near. All six pre-registered instrument gates valid: label coverage 1.0 (2352/2352 scored labels), pool valid (no judge inverted, all >=90% labelled), kernel-free tier-1 truth effect 0.804 >= 0.30, style fidelity 0.94 pair-differ / 1.00 marker-reduction >= 0.80, length match 0.985 >= 0.90, retest 0.9306 >= 0.85 [MEASURED]. Holm family F-secondary(ts): judge1p_style_tost PASSED (point 0.01, p 0.0003 - the member that specifically protects the A_1p family); wrong_cell_style_inflation NOT established (point 0.0, p 1.0 - H-FALSE-ACCEPT-INFLATION, the exact channel that would fabricate endorsement under H-CIRC, showed literally nothing); correct_cell_style_tost DID NOT PASS Holm (point 0.05, p 0.0375 vs Holm-adjusted 0.025 - correct-cell equivalence is uncertified) [MEASURED]. Gate-A cross-vendor audit: Codex/GPT-5.6-Sol auditor-7 reproduced the frozen hash, the 2-line hash-chained log, all 4 pin amendments, the analysis output byte-for-byte, every gate, and the fired rule - CONFIRM, 10/10 checks [MEASURED]. The audit certifies the PASS as the correct pure function of the committed bytes and certifies NOTHING about judge quality or bias; the auditor's model identity with judge-p1 (GPT-5.6-Sol) is disclosed in the audit record and is irrelevant to a byte-recompute, load-bearing for anything more - which is why nothing more is claimed.
licenses: [MEASURED] H-STYLE-ROBUST at exactly its frozen construction: for THIS pinned 3-LLM judge pool (GPT-5.6-Sol, GPT-5.5, Claude-Haiku-4.5), under the S1 fit+identification standards WITH the S6 register-immunity instruction (the condition actually in force on the f2b line), in single-stimulus yes/no/cannot-say acceptance format, on d-ts, the style main effect on acceptance at matched truth is within +/-0.10 absolute (measured 0.025 [0.0033, 0.0467]). Kill_criterion clause (b) verbatim: 'PASS = style-robust at margin 0.10 for THIS pool/format; the style-leak guard is lifted at that margin and no further.'

[STIPULATED: ASM-0680] The guard-lift, operationalized: f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings no longer carry a mandatory style-bias band. Concretely for f2b-transfer-llmproxy: A_1p = 0.95 may now be cited as a content-endorsement reading (at its own weak-proxy ceiling, ASM-0022) without the style-bias caveat this record existed to adjudicate. Had truthstyle-2x2 FAILED, the frozen kill clause (a) would have forced every f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement reading - A_1p = 0.95 included, and under the FORK-4 stipulation the pending human Stage-1 A - to carry the measured interval as a style-bias band permanently. That counterfactual burden is discharged in the PASS direction; the citation discipline for the lift is fixed by ASM-0680 and travels with every downstream use.

[MEASURED] The 'endorsement reads as content endorsement, not style endorsement' interpretation survives with a quantified bound: for this judge class and format, surface register alone moves acceptance by at most 0.10 absolute (measured point 0.025), so an endorsement statistic standing 0.25 above its bar (A_1p 0.95 vs 0.70) cannot be style-manufactured within the certified bound - the frozen margin was chosen (design section 4.3 arithmetic, STIPULATED) precisely so that an in-margin bias cannot carry an expected-A reading across the kill-d bar. Sharper still: the Holm-CERTIFIED judge-p1 member (point 0.01, TOST pass) bounds the exact judge family that produced A_1p.

[MEASURED] The H-FALSE-ACCEPT-INFLATION threat - NSM shaping raising acceptance of semantically WRONG content, the live channel named by the llmproxy envelope and ASM-0021 as the way endorsement could be fabricated under H-CIRC - produced a point estimate of exactly 0.0 on the truth-wrong cells (one-sided p 1.0). Read honestly as a favorable non-rejection (no TOST was registered on that cell, so it is not a certified bound), it is nonetheless the direction in which the instrument had every chance to embarrass the f2b line and did not.

[MEASURED] Instrument facts with standing value: the judges strongly separate correct from wrong content on BOTH tiers (tier-1 kernel-free external gold truth effect 0.804; tier-2 kernel-bytes truth effect 0.638), the style manipulation was real (0.94/1.00 fidelity), labels are stable (retest 0.9306, disclosed as a temperature-0 floor, not judge-quality evidence), and escapes were essentially unused (only cell rate: t2:wrong:plain 0.0033). The 2x2 factorial adjudication machinery itself (blind stateless invocations, pinned per-judge order, mandatory escape, per-attempt validity gates) executed 2424 planned invocations to 100% label coverage across two vendors and three models.

[MEASURED] Verdict standing: Gate-A cross-vendor CONFIRM, 10/10 checks, byte-for-byte reproduction of the analysis output and independent re-derivation of the primary (15/600) and the bootstrap interval. The PASS is the correct pure function of the frozen record + 4-amendment overlay + hash-chained log + pinned analysis over the committed corpora.

[STIPULATED: ASM-0644] Process integrity of the p3 lane, adopted as ruled: the ~1% MCP tool-definition leak (8/818 init events) was voided per-attempt by the pre-registered, content-blind init.tools==[] validity gate before any answer byte was read; every retained label is proven tool-less by its own captured init event; 808/808 labelled; blinding sweep GREEN under Amendment A1. The verdict stands on the ruling's frozen-clause argument, not on any mechanism story (ASM-0646 stays non-load-bearing).
does_not_license: [ENVELOPE-BOUND, verbatim] 'It does NOT license: any claim that kernel content is correct (no endpoint scores gold agreement); any H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC adjudication (that is f2b-transfer's alone); transfer to HUMAN judges (registered extrapolation, FORK-3 - the pending human Stage-1 A is NOT cleared by this probe); transfer to the f2b MCQ/best-fit format beyond the FORK-4 STIPULATION (single-stimulus acceptance is a different judging act); margins tighter than 0.10 (FORK-5); other style transforms, other concepts, other corpora, or any coverage-general claim.' Every downstream citation of the lift inherits this sentence via ASM-0680.

[MEASURED, and the single most important honesty point] The PASS is NOT 'zero style effect'. The margin +/-0.10 is a STIPULATED equivalence threshold (design section 4.3, FORK-5), and the measured effect is real: 0.025 pooled with an interval excluding zero, NSM-favoring, concentrated in the truth-correct cell (point 0.05) and largest for the designer-family judge (p3 Haiku 0.045 vs p1 0.01, p2 0.02). 'Style-robust' means BOUNDED AT 0.10, and ASM-0680 clause 2 forbids rounding it to 'no style effect' anywhere downstream.

[MEASURED] No per-cell or per-judge equivalence beyond the Holm-certified members: the truth-CORRECT-cell TOST failed Holm (point 0.05, p 0.0375 > 0.025), so a consumer wanting certified equivalence specifically on correct-labelled content - the rhetorically tempting cell for endorsement readings - cannot get it from this record; only the pooled primary and the judge-p1 member carry certificates. The wrong-cell inflation result is a non-rejection, not a bound. (The truth-cell MEANINGS additionally rest on the STIPULATED own-gloss-is-correct reading, ASM-0048; the pooled primary deliberately does not.)

[ENVELOPE-BOUND + MEASURED] Nothing tighter than 0.10: the measured interval happens to lie inside +/-0.05, but the 0.05-margin claim was NOT pre-registered (FORK-5 registers it as a successor), and this record licenses margin 0.10 and no further. Citing the interval as if a 0.05 equivalence had been established is exactly the post-hoc promotion the freeze discipline exists to prevent.

[EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0047] Human judges remain fully guarded: no human was measured (FORK-3, LS-4 eligibility), human style susceptibility on NSM-register text may differ in either direction, and no human-judge reading - including the pending f2b-transfer Stage-1 A - may cite truthstyle-2x2 as style clearance. ASM-0047 is untouched by this PASS.

[STIPULATED: ASM-0045] The bridge to f2b's actual judging acts is and remains a stipulation: single-stimulus acceptance is a DIFFERENT judging act from MCQ best-fit comparison. The guard-lift reaches f2b-line endorsement readings only through ASM-0045; a consumer unwilling to grant that stipulation gets a bound on single-stimulus acceptance only. The registered resolution path (MCQ-format successor cell) was conditioned on a LEAKY read and is therefore not mandated.

[MEASURED, disclosed] What this record does NOT bound about familiarity: within each pair, content is matched - so the probe bounds the SURFACE-REGISTER channel of ASM-0021's familiarity threat and says nothing about judge familiarity with NSM canonical CONTENT (held constant by construction). ASM-0021 stays open; its full resolution path remains the human-vs-proxy delta on f2b-transfer Stage-1. This record narrows the threat, it does not close it.

[DESIGN-BOUND] The family-overlap disclosures cap the independence claim: two of three judges are same-vendor GPT models; judge-p3 is designer-family (Anthropic, FORK-2 caveat - its labels are raw data graded by a pinned pure function, never an audit role); and the Gate-A auditor is the SAME MODEL as judge-p1 (GPT-5.6-Sol, disclosed in the audit record). The audit therefore certifies mechanics only. All judges are LLMs: 'blind' here means context-blind to tier/truth/style/provenance, never training-data-blind.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, mandatory coverage restatement] Kernel-expressibility coverage is 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on ONE incomplete kernel-v0 instance - the tier-2 concepts are 100 of those same 108 covered concepts and nothing here extends coverage. scale_language_licensed = 'none' in the verdict object is honoured verbatim: no rung claim, no host model, no scale statement of any kind issues from this record.

[DESIGN-BOUND] No kernel mechanism, no lift, no end task: R0, $0 GPU, no vector crossed any interface (Law-1; the kernel-as-text null roles were carried by the plain-twin and deranged-donor cell families). This record measured a JUDGE POOL. It promotes no kernel-content claim and demotes none.

epistemic_promotions.claim: for the pinned 3-LLM judge pool under S1+S6 in single-stimulus acceptance format on d-ts, NSM-shaped vs plain surface at matched truth and matched content moves acceptance by at most +/-0.10 absolute (measured 0.025, 90% interval [0.0033, 0.0467])
epistemic_promotions.scope: the frozen envelope verbatim: this pool, this format, this corpus, margin 0.10 - and no further

epistemic_promotions.claim: the style-leak guard on f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings (A_1p = 0.95 included) is lifted
epistemic_promotions.to: LIFTED-AT-MARGIN-0.10 under the ASM-0680 citation discipline
epistemic_promotions.scope: reaches f2b formats only via the ASM-0045 FORK-4 stipulation; humans stay guarded (ASM-0047); margins <0.10 stay guarded (FORK-5)

epistemic_promotions.claim: a real but small NSM-favoring register preference exists in current LLM judges and concentrates where content already fits
epistemic_promotions.to: MEASURED as an effect (interval excludes 0); its causal reading stays EXTRAPOLATION (ASM-0681, non-load-bearing)
epistemic_promotions.scope: this pool/format; the content-familiarity component of ASM-0021 is untouched by construction

epistemic_promotions.claim: any statement about human judges, tighter margins, MCQ-measured bounds, H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC, kernel-content correctness, or coverage
epistemic_promotions.to: NO PROMOTION - remains UNMEASURED, STIPULATED, or EXTRAPOLATION exactly as registered
epistemic_promotions.scope: no promotion; envelope binds every citation

forks_resolved.resolution: ROBUST at margin 0.10 for this pool/format: TOST passed decisively (interval [0.0033, 0.0467] inside +/-0.10), audit-confirmed. H-STYLE-LEAKY is excluded above 0.0467 at the one-sided 95% level - not merely 'not demonstrated'. Symmetric scope honoured: the PASS lifts the guard at 0.10 and no further.

NOT DEMONSTRATED, point exactly 0.0 (p 1.0): NSM shaping did not raise acceptance of wrong content at all in this sample. Favorable non-rejection, not a certified bound (no TOST registered on that cell).

ALL SIX GATES VALID - the instrument measured what it claimed to: real style manipulation (0.94/1.00), kernel-free truth discrimination (0.804), stable labels (0.9306), full coverage (1.0), length matched (0.985), no judge inverted.

The design-time choice of tier-2 is vindicated in execution: the tier-1 transform stayed near-null as expected (style diagnostic 0.0087, no endpoint) while the tier-2 manipulation was strong (0.94) - an equivalence primary on tier-1 would have been the false-reassurance failure the fork named. No contest arises.

The 3-judge equal-weight pool did its job: per-judge effects reported (p1 0.01, p2 0.02, p3 0.045) so no family-specific leak hid in the pool mean; the largest point sits with the designer-family judge and still inside the margin; only p1 carries a Holm certificate. Designer-family caveat stands disclosed.
UNRESOLVED BY DESIGN and untouched: ASM-0047 (EXTRAPOLATION, non-load-bearing) stands; resolution path remains the post-Stage-1 human rider on fresh items.

CONSUMED AS STIPULATED: the guard-lift reaches f2b MCQ/claim readings only via ASM-0045. The registered MCQ-successor path was conditioned on LEAKY and is not mandated by a ROBUST read; the stipulation stands as the permanent, visible bridge.

0.10 DISCHARGED in the PASS direction. The measured interval incidentally lies inside +/-0.05, so a pre-registered 0.05 successor is plausibly cheap to pass - noted as sizing colour [EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0681-adjacent, carries no license]; 0.05 remains the registered successor margin and is NOT claimed.

_mechanism_note: This record carries no kernel mechanism claim to be alive or dead. What it settles is an INSTRUMENT property: the f2b line's LLM-judge endorsement readings are, at margin 0.10 and within the frozen scope, readings of content rather than of NSM surface register. The kernel-side attribution questions are exactly where they were: alignment-vs-content belongs to knull, transfer-vs-circularity to the human-judged f2b-transfer Stage-1.
composition_note: Where this sits in the correctness-thesis evidence tree. The thesis currently rests on two live lines plus their instruments: (1) the f2b line (verifier-offload): f2b-replicate PROMOTED at envelope scope; f2b-transfer frozen and unconsumed (the sole H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC adjudicator); f2b-transfer-llmproxy A_1p=0.95 as a weak feasibility proxy (ASM-0022 ceiling); (2) the NL-boundary line (l3a-parse / a5-llm): grammar reachability and the engine-vs-LLM differentiator, with its own audit custody. truthstyle-2x2 is f2b-line-LOCAL: it is a NECESSARY SUPPORTING result - a style-robustness certificate for the judge instrument - not a direct kernel-correctness claim. Necessary in the precise sense that without it every f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement statistic carried an unquantified style channel (the guard this record's consumer rule governed), and the llmproxy assessment could cite A_1p=0.95 only with that channel explicitly open; with it, the channel is bounded at 0.10 (measured 0.025) for the pool actually in force. Supporting in the precise sense that it scores zero kernel content: were every kernel gloss wrong, this record could read identically (a style-robust judge is an instrument fact). It contributes to the CORRECTNESS thesis by making the f2b line's endorsement evidence INTERPRETABLE, and it was one of the three pre-unblind obligations the llmproxy assessment named (truthstyle-2x2; knull + content-injection map; failure-cause taxonomy) - it has now landed WITH confirmatory standing, having frozen 2026-07-10T10:02:06Z before f2b-transfer Stage-2 unblinds (R-2 timing honoured). It neither strengthens nor constrains the NL-boundary records: l3a/a5 consume no LLM-judge endorsement reading of kernel-register text, so the guard-lift does not reach them and their results do not back-stop this one. The load-bearing chain for the eventual correctness verdict now reads: judge instrument style-clean at margin (THIS RECORD) -> proxy endorsement interpretable (llmproxy, weak-proxy ceiling) -> human Stage-1 adjudicates H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC (still guarded for humans, ASM-0047) -> knull adjudicates what any lift is evidence OF. Only the last two move the kernel-content claim itself.

questions_opened.question: OPTIONAL, unblocked: pre-register the FORK-5 successor at margin 0.05 if any downstream consumer ever needs a tighter certified band. The measured interval [0.0033, 0.0467] already lies inside +/-0.05, so a fresh-data successor is plausibly cheap - but it must be a NEW pre-registered record over fresh adjudication (the committed labels are post-hoc for any tighter claim). Only worth the ~$40-class spend on demonstrated consumer demand.

OPTIONAL: the truth-correct cell's simple style effect (point 0.05) failed its Holm TOST - a consumer needing CERTIFIED equivalence specifically on correct-labelled content would need a successor powered for the cell-level contrast (roughly double the per-cell n). Fold into the 0.05-margin successor if both are ever wanted; do not run alone without a named consumer.

UNCHANGED (ASM-0047's registered path, restated so it is never forgotten behind the PASS): post-Stage-1 human style rider on FRESH items, never before f2b-transfer Stage-1 completes (LS-4 eligibility). Until it runs, no human-judge reading cites truthstyle-2x2 as clearance.

SEQUENCING, reaffirmed: with llmproxy PASS + truthstyle PASS, the remaining pre-unblind obligations before f2b-transfer Stage-2 are knull (+ its content-injection map precondition) and the f2b-errors taxonomy discipline. They bind exactly as before; this record removes only the style item from the list.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED planning estimates, never measurements. No new science stubs: this record changes the interpretive standing of existing f2b-line evidence, not the science queue.

ledger_updates.statement: truthstyle-2x2: style-ROBUST at margin 0.10 - NSM-shaped vs plain surface at matched truth and matched content moves the pinned 3-LLM pool's acceptance by 0.025 (90% interval [0.0033, 0.0467], strictly inside +/-0.10); all 6 instrument gates valid; Gate-A cross-vendor audit CONFIRM 10/10. The style-leak guard on f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings is LIFTED at that margin and no further (ASM-0680 citation discipline).
ledger_updates.scope: this pool (GPT-5.6-Sol, GPT-5.5, Haiku-4.5), S1+S6 single-stimulus acceptance, d-ts, margin 0.10; f2b formats via ASM-0045 only; humans excluded (ASM-0047); coverage 0.3542 @ molecules-v0 (m0b) restated; scale_language none

ledger_updates.statement: The measured style effect is NONZERO and NSM-favoring (interval excludes 0), concentrated in the truth-correct cell (0.05; Holm TOST uncertified there) and largest for the designer-family judge (p3 0.045); the wrong-cell inflation point is exactly 0.0. 'Style-robust' = bounded at 0.10, never 'no style effect'.

ledger_updates.statement: Judges separate correct from wrong content strongly on kernel-free external gold (tier-1 truth effect 0.804) and on kernel bytes (tier-2 0.638); style manipulation fidelity 0.94/1.00; retest 0.9306 (temperature-0 floor); label coverage 1.0 over 2352 scored labels; escapes ~0.

Two instrument events, both resolved without touching frozen bytes and both audit-visible: the pos-102 base62 blinding false-positive (Amendment A1, ASM-0660/0661; p3-only fresh re-run; sweep GREEN) and the ~1% MCP tool-definition leak (ASM-0644/0645: per-attempt content-blind init.tools==[] gate voided all 8 leaked attempts; every retained label proven tool-less). The per-call init.tools==[] gate is the binding invariant for all future headless blind judges.

tree_impact: No kernel-candidate promotion and no demotion - this record cannot move a content claim by construction. What changes: (1) INTERPRETIVE STANDING - the style-leak guard on f2b-line LLM-judge endorsement readings lifts at margin 0.10 under the ASM-0680 citation discipline; f2b-transfer-llmproxy's A_1p = 0.95 sheds the style-bias caveat it has carried since its own assessment (which explicitly deferred the subtle style channel 'to the truth-x-style 2x2 probe' - that deferral is now discharged for the register component, at margin 0.10, LLM judges only); (2) SEQUENCING - one of the three pre-unblind obligations before f2b-transfer Stage-2 (truthstyle-2x2, knull + content-injection map, failure-cause taxonomy) has landed with confirmatory standing (frozen 2026-07-10T10:02:06Z, before any Stage-2 unblind; R-2 honoured); the other two bind unchanged, and the human Stage-1 remains the sole H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC adjudicator, still style-unguarded for humans (ASM-0047); (3) INSTRUMENT LAW - the per-call init.tools==[] gate (ASM-0644 H1) and the A1 vendor-id blinding rule (ASM-0660) are now execution-proven and carry forward to every successor headless blind judge; (4) NL-boundary line - unaffected in both directions: l3a/a5 consume no f2b-judge endorsement reading, so the lift does not reach them. Ledger mechanics, NOT performed here per lane custody: the fable cell for truthstyle-2x2 in registry/audit-status.jsonl moves pending -> done referencing this record (Opus runner lane); no frozen object, no verdict byte, no log line, and no other experiment's files were touched by this assessment.
